name: Obfuscation Script Usage via MSHTA to Execute VBScript
description: Detects the execution of obfuscated PowerShell scripts using MSHTA to execute VBScript, a technique used by adversaries to bypass defenses. This combination is often used to execute malicious code.

parameters.name: timestamp
parameters.description: The timestamp of the process creation event.

parameters.name: event_id
parameters.description: The Windows event ID for process creation (e.g., Sysmon Event ID 1).

parameters.name: process_name
parameters.description: The name of the process that executed (should be mshta.exe).

parameters.name: process_path
parameters.description: The full path to the mshta.exe executable.

parameters.name: command_line
parameters.description: The complete command line used, including the suspicious VBScript components.

parameters.name: user
parameters.description: The user account under which mshta.exe was executed.

parameters.name: computer_name
parameters.description: The name of the computer where the event occurred.
